We don't just think outside the box—we r: We don't just think outside the box—we redefine it.
MediaBubble is a full-service marketing: MediaBubble is a full-service marketing and advertising agency based in Hurghada, Egypt. Founded in 2015, we've grown into a team of 22+ dedicated professionals committed to helping businesses thrive through innovative, results-driven strategies.

Validate on blur for most fields. Show i: Validate on blur for most fields. Show inline errors directly below the affected input. Never validate on every keystroke — it feels adversarial.
Standard nav — active state uses bottom: Standard nav — active state uses bottom border + bold weight.

Toggle between views. Equal-width segmen: Toggle between views. Equal-width segments, active state slides between them.
Used in sub-navigation and filter bars.
No auto results. Use @ to mention people: No auto results. Use @ to mention people, files, or pages.
services.0.name: Strategic & Creative Marketing
services.0.desc: Strategy consulting, creative services, media production

brand.tagline: Strategic creative that fills rooms and grows brands.
brand.description: MediaBubble is a marketing and advertising agency based in Hurghada, Egypt. Since 2015, a team of 22+ strategists, designers, and developers has helped brands grow through SEO, branding, web development, and content — measuring outcomes, not outputs.
overview.pillars.heading: Brand Pillars
overview.visualSystem.heading: Visual System at a Glance
overview.services.heading: Service Areas
pillars.creative.name: Creative
pillars.creative.def: Ideas with a point of view. Not decoration, not trend-following — work that earns attention because it earns trust.
pillars.strategic.name: Strategic
pillars.strategic.def: Every decision traces back to a goal. We align visual choices, copy, and media to what the client is actually trying to achieve.
pillars.dataDriven.name: Data-Driven
pillars.dataDriven.def: Numbers inform, not decide. We read performance data, test hypotheses, and improve — creative judgment stays in the loop, not out of it.

gettingStartedDesc: Your starting point for the MediaBubble brand system. Four steps, three shortcuts, and answers to common questions.
findYourColorsDesc: Copy any brand color value with one click. HEX, RGB, and CSS variables ready to paste.
setYourTypeDesc: View the Poppins, Inter, and Cairo scale. Each size has a role and a CSS class.
useComponentsDesc: Buttons, form inputs, cards, and badges — every state defined, every variant ready.
matchTheToneDesc: Two voice registers, tone-by-content-type matrix, and a list of prohibited phrases.
copyColorDesc: Jump to the palette and copy HEX values instantly.
previewFontDesc: See Poppins, Inter, JetBrains Mono, and Cairo at every weight.
buildFromComponentDesc: Copy button, input, card, and badge code with all states included.
faq1q: Can I use the brand colors outside the defined palette?
faq1a: No. Use only the colors defined in the palette. If a color is missing, request an addition — do not invent your own.
faq2q: Which font do I use for Arabic content?
faq2a: Cairo. It pairs with Inter for mixed-direction layouts.
faq3q: Can I modify the logo mark?
faq3a: No. Use only the approved variants shown in the Logo section. Do not rotate, recolor, or add effects.
faq4q: Where do I find downloadable assets?
faq4a: The Asset Library has logos, color tokens, and font references — all ready to copy or download.
proTipDesc: Press ⌘K (Mac) or Ctrl+K (Windows) to search any page from anywhere in the guide.
Maintain clear space equal to half the l: Maintain clear space equal to half the logo width on all sides
Never do this — see approved variants ab: Never do this — see approved variants above
colors.hero.title: Color Palette
colors.hero.description: Blue is the primary color — it drives navigation, actions, and information hierarchy. Yellow is the accent: reserved, purposeful, and used once per view. Click any swatch to preview it.
colors.pangram: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
colors.wcagDefinition: AA = minimum compliance. AAA = enhanced compliance. Large text = 18px+ bold or 24px+ regular.
colors.emptyState: Enter a foreground and background hex color (e.g. #333333 on #FFFFFF) to check WCAG contrast.
colors.wcagDescription: WCAG 2.1 AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text. AAA requires 7:1 and 4.5:1. Click any swatch above to copy its hex, then paste into either field.
The primary color of the entire system. Drives navigation, primary buttons, links, focus rings, and information hierarchy across every surface.
The deeper anchor. Use for display headi: The deeper anchor. Use for display headings, sidebar/dark-mode surfaces, and hover intensification of Brand Blue.
The accent that cuts through. Reserve fo: The accent that cuts through. Reserve for primary CTAs, active navigation states, and single moments per view that must earn attention. Never use for body text or large backgrounds.
Use for dark containers, sidebars, and f: Use for dark containers, sidebars, and footer backgrounds. Not for body text, pair with lighter elements.
Three families, one system. Poppins lead: Three families, one system. Poppins leads, Inter reads, JetBrains Mono codes. Every size and weight serves a role, not a decoration.
Geometric, confident, modern. Used for h: Geometric, confident, modern. Used for headings, display type, and brand moments.
Legible, versatile, web-optimized. Used: Legible, versatile, web-optimized. Used for body copy, labels, and UI elements.
Developer-first monospace. Used for code: Developer-first monospace. Used for code snippets, metadata, and configuration values.
Full Arabic script support for bilingual: Full Arabic script support for bilingual layouts. Pairs naturally with Inter for mixed-direction copy.
Open letter shapes (clear at small sizes: Open letter shapes (clear at small sizes)
Poppins headlines capture attention with: Poppins headlines capture attention with geometric confidence. Body copy in Inter keeps visitors reading with comfortable line heights and 65 characters per line.
For longer-form content, Inter body text: For longer-form content, Inter body text at 14px with 1.6 line height ensures readability across devices. Paired with clean Poppins subheads for visual rhythm.
Compact card layouts use tighter Poppins: Compact card layouts use tighter Poppins headings with reduced tracking, paired with dense Inter labels and JetBrains Mono for configuration values.
WCAG AAA compliant for all body text siz: WCAG AAA compliant for all body text sizes
Headlines scale between breakpoints usin: Headlines scale between breakpoints using CSS clamp(). Body text stays at 14px minimum.
Tighten for headlines, reset for body cl: Tighten for headlines, reset for body clarity
Body text at 65ch max. Shorter lines imp: Body text at 65ch max. Shorter lines improve readability across all viewports.
Minimum 1.25x between steps. Hierarchy t: Minimum 1.25x between steps. Hierarchy through weight and color, not inflated sizes.
Body at 1.6 line height for comfortable: Body at 1.6 line height for comfortable reading. Display text tight but never clipped.
Headlines use fluid clamp() sizing. Body: Headlines use fluid clamp() sizing. Body never smaller than 14px on any device.
Bold or italic within the same family. N: Bold or italic within the same family. Never mix families just to add visual interest.
Poppins for display moments. Inter for r: Poppins for display moments. Inter for reading. JetBrains Mono for code and data only.
Lucide React throughout: 24px default gr: Lucide React throughout: 24px default grid, 1.5px stroke weight, consistent optical centering. One library, one visual grammar, every screen.
Inline with text, dense UI labels: Inline with text, dense UI labels
Default — most UI contexts and cards: Default — most UI contexts and cards
Always 1.5px strokeWidth. Never mix with: Always 1.5px strokeWidth. Never mix with filled icons or outline-only variants from other libraries.
Icons inherit text color. Use color for: Icons inherit text color. Use color for state (blue = active, yellow = accent), not arbitrary decoration.
Align icons to the optical center of adj: Align icons to the optical center of adjacent text, not the bounding box. A 1–2px offset is common at 16px.
Navigation icons always have a text labe: Navigation icons always have a text label. Icon-only is permitted only in toolbars with persistent tooltips on hover.
Do not combine Lucide with Heroicons, Fo: Do not combine Lucide with Heroicons, FontAwesome, or Feather. Different optical weights break consistency.
Icons on color backgrounds need 3:1 mini: Icons on color backgrounds need 3:1 minimum. Muted steel (#9E9E9E) is for supporting context only, not primary icons.
MediaBubble has two distinct voice regis: MediaBubble has two distinct voice registers, each appropriate to different contexts. Both are authentically MediaBubble, but they serve different audiences and purposes.
Confident and partnership-oriented. Seco: Confident and partnership-oriented. Secondary: aspirational. Avoid: hype language without evidence.
Addresses client goals directly (\"Your: Addresses client goals directly ("Your Q3 targets need a content engine that compounds — not a one-off campaign.")
Positions the client relationship as a p: Positions the client relationship as a partnership — "strategic allies," "we collaborate," not "vendor and client."
Confident and evidence-based (\"We incre: Confident and evidence-based ("We increased organic traffic 340% in six months.")
Frames every offer around the client's m: Frames every offer around the client's measurable outcome, not the agency process
Alliteration and rhetorical questions (\: Alliteration and rhetorical questions ("Be seen, be heard, and be found")
Direct, second-person address (\"You nee: Direct, second-person address ("You need SEO, and here's why")
Clear CTAs at natural stopping points: Clear CTAs at natural stopping points
\"We're your strategic partner — the tea: "We're your strategic partner — the team that turned a regional resort into a booking-first brand with a 68% direct-booking rate."
\"SEO isn't a luxury—it's a must. Here's: "SEO isn't a luxury—it's a must. Here's why your business can't afford to wait."
Yellow button • 1–2x per page • High pro: Yellow button • 1–2x per page • High prominence
Used on every service page, hero section: Used on every service page, hero section, and high-value conversion points
Blue button • Lower priority • Supportin: Blue button • Lower priority • Supporting actions
Use \"Explore [Service Name]\" for servi: Use "Explore [Service Name]" for service pages, "View Our Work" for portfolio. Avoid "Learn More" as a standalone CTA.
Used inline within content for contextua: Used inline within content for contextual linking
Used in email campaigns for higher engag: Used in email campaigns for higher engagement
Discover more • Read the full post • See: Discover more • Read the full post • See how we helped [Client]
Claim Your Free Consultation / Yes, I Wa: Claim Your Free Consultation / Yes, I Want to Grow My Business / Let's Talk Strategy
Most overused phrase in agency marketing: Most overused phrase in agency marketing — triggers skepticism
Weak CTA — replace with \"Schedule a Fre: Weak CTA — replace with "Schedule a Free Consultation"
No context for the link destination: No context for the link destination
Same problem as cutting-edge — name spec: Same problem as cutting-edge — name specifics instead
Signals uncertainty — MediaBubble delive: Signals uncertainty — MediaBubble delivers, it doesn't try
Overused blog opener — start with the pr: Overused blog opener — start with the problem instead
Every interactive element, every state d: Every interactive element, every state defined. Consistent vocabulary across every surface — the same button shape, the same form control, the same focus ring everywhere.
primaryBtnDesc: Use for the single primary action per view (save, submit, confirm).
destructiveBtnDesc: Destructive actions — delete, remove, discard. Always confirm before executing.
inverse surface: Dark background — use in hero sections
Standard elevation — 1px border, soft sh: Standard elevation — 1px border, soft shadow. No paired shadow + border.
Decisive lift on cursor enter. Shadow sc: Decisive lift on cursor enter. Shadow scales up, content translates -1px.
Yellow top-border variant. Use when one: Yellow top-border variant. Use when one card in a grid needs to lead.
Deep blue surface for hero blocks, featu: Deep blue surface for hero blocks, feature callouts, and dark sections.
Single border — no border + shadow pairi: Single border — no border + shadow pairing
contactDesc: Tell us about your project. We respond within one business day with next steps.
Looking forward to working with your tea: Looking forward to working with your team on our rebrand.
validationDesc: Validate inputs on blur, not on every keystroke. Display error messages directly below the field that failed. Validating on every keystroke frustrates users.
Standard nav — active state uses bottom: Standard nav — active state uses bottom border + bold weight. Best for top-level navigation.
Content-switching pattern — active pill: Content-switching pattern — active pill uses brand blue fill. Used in sub-navigation and filter bars.
Toggle between views. Equal-width segmen: Toggle between views. Equal-width segments, active state slides between them.
Status badges indicate system state. Use: Status badges indicate system state. Use the semantic color for the correct context — success green, warning amber, error red, info blue.
An 8px base grid with nine named steps. Every gap, padding, and margin in the system traces back to one of these tokens. No arbitrary values.
Card internal gaps, form field spacing: Card internal gaps, form field spacing
Top-level section gaps, max page breathi: Top-level section gaps, max page breathing room
Feature cards, service areas, typography: Feature cards, service areas, typography rules
Metrics, key values, compact data pairs: Metrics, key values, compact data pairs
Auto-reflows cards into as many columns: Auto-reflows cards into as many columns as fit the viewport. Best for card galleries with equal-width items.
Content never exceeds this at any viewpo: Content never exceeds this at any viewport
Content breathing room from viewport edg: Content breathing room from viewport edges
Fixed left nav; collapses on mobile: Fixed left nav; collapses on mobile
Fixed; contains breadcrumb and menu trig: Fixed; contains breadcrumb and menu trigger
collateral.hero.title: Collateral
collateral.hero.description: Every physical touchpoint follows the same system: deep blue anchored by yellow, logo locked to the brand zone, contact set in Inter.
collateral.businessCard.heading: Business Card
collateral.spec.dimensionsNote: Standard international size. Print at 90 × 55 mm with 2.5mm bleed
collateral.spec.frontNote: Logo white (filter: invert). Name in Poppins Bold 14pt, title in Inter 10pt
collateral.spec.backNote: 2px left rule + 1px top/bottom accent in #072A6B; contact in Inter Regular 9pt
collateral.spec.paperStockNote: Matte or soft-touch laminate on front. Avoid gloss — reflects poorly under office lighting
Avatar crops, favicon variants, and emai: Avatar crops, favicon variants, and email signature for consistent brand presence across every digital touchpoint.
HTML table · works in Gmail, Outlook, Ap: HTML table · works in Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail
Table layout for maximum email client co: Table layout for maximum email client compatibility (Outlook, Gmail, Apple Mail)
Vertical separator between logo and name: Vertical separator between logo and name/contact block
Bottom accent line mirrors the letterhea: Bottom accent line mirrors the letterhead footer treatment
Email clients block embedded images; hos: Email clients block embedded images; host logo.svg on a CDN or static domain
Three before-and-after case studies show: Three before-and-after case studies showing how the brand system transforms real MediaBubble deliverables. Each one applies the same color, typography, and component rules you have been using throughout these guidelines.
A plain-text signature with a mismatched: A plain-text signature with a mismatched font, a generic blue link, and no brand identity. Recipients could not tell it was from MediaBubble.
A polished HTML signature using the bran: A polished HTML signature using the brand blue divider, the correct Inter font stack, and a dark blue gradient footer bar. The logo anchors the left column, contact details sit on the right.
Replaced Arial with Inter font family: Replaced Arial with Inter font family
Added 2px #2196F3 divider between logo a: Added 2px #2196F3 divider between logo and contact block
Used #333333 for body text, #666666 for: Used #333333 for body text, #666666 for labels
Each platform had its own color treatmen: Each platform had its own color treatment. Instagram used a warm filter, LinkedIn used a blue gradient, Twitter had no consistent treatment. The brand appeared fragmented.
A unified template system across all soc: A unified template system across all social platforms. Brand Yellow used for the accent bar at the bottom, brand blue for the headline text, and a consistent #072A6B top section. Logo locked to the top-left.
Unified top banner color to #072A6B acro: Unified top banner color to #072A6B across all platforms
Added consistent #FFC107 accent bar at b: Added consistent #FFC107 accent bar at base
Standardized headline in Poppins Bold, b: Standardized headline in Poppins Bold, body in Inter
Locked logo position — top-left on every: Locked logo position — top-left on every asset
A mix of slide templates — some with sto: A mix of slide templates — some with stock photos, some with flat colors, inconsistent heading sizes, and no typography system. The deck felt assembled rather than designed.
A clean slide system with defined roles:: A clean slide system with defined roles: Poppins for slide titles, Inter for body copy, brand yellow for accent lines and callout boxes, and a deep blue footer bar on every slide.
Applied Poppins Bold for all slide title: Applied Poppins Bold for all slide titles at consistent size
Introduced Inter for body copy across al: Introduced Inter for body copy across all slides
Added #FFC107 accent line as section div: Added #FFC107 accent line as section divider on title slides
Deep blue (#072A6B) footer bar on every: Deep blue (#072A6B) footer bar on every slide template
All brand files in one place: logo varia: All brand files in one place: logo variants, color tokens, font references. Copy values directly or download files for production use.
Create on-brand prompts for generative A: Create on-brand prompts for generative AI tools using MediaBubble's Brand DNA
Try selecting a different category or ch: Try selecting a different category or check back later for more templates.
Enter your custom prompt here. Brand DNA: Enter your custom prompt here. Brand DNA constraints will still be applied...
The Brand DNA represents the core visual: The Brand DNA represents the core visual and design principles that define MediaBubble's identity. When creating prompts for generative AI tools, incorporating these elements ensures all generated assets maintain brand consistency and professional quality.
These elements are strictly forbidden in: These elements are strictly forbidden in MediaBubble designs:
Strategic use of Brand Yellow and Brand: Strategic use of Brand Yellow and Brand Blue with strict contrast guidelines
Controlled hierarchy through weight and: Controlled hierarchy through weight and color, not massive scale
Asymmetric compositions with clean spati: Asymmetric compositions with clean spatial zones and purposeful whitespace
Consistent UI elements with premium styl: Consistent UI elements with premium styling and micro-interactions
Brand Yellow (#FFC107) - Primary CTAs an: Brand Yellow (#FFC107) - Primary CTAs and highlights
Brand Blue (#2196F3) - Secondary actions: Brand Blue (#2196F3) - Secondary actions and navigation
JetBrains Mono - Code snippets and metad: JetBrains Mono - Code snippets and metadata
No generic system fonts for premium cont: No generic system fonts for premium contexts
Buttons: Rounded 12px, tactile -1px tran: Buttons: Rounded 12px, tactile -1px translate on active
Cards: Rounded 16px, soft border, diffus: Cards: Rounded 16px, soft border, diffused shadow
Navigation: Deep Charcoal sidebar, Brand: Navigation: Deep Charcoal sidebar, Brand Yellow accents
No nested cards or custom cursors: No nested cards or custom cursors
Paste your prompt above to analyze it fo: Paste your prompt above to analyze it for MediaBubble brand compliance.
Checking for MediaBubble brand complianc: Checking for MediaBubble brand compliance and providing recommendations.
How well this prompt follows MediaBubble: How well this prompt follows MediaBubble brand guidelines
Asymmetric hero with strategic Brand Yel: Asymmetric hero with strategic Brand Yellow accent
Premium feature cards with consistent st: Premium feature cards with consistent styling
Professional dashboard with Brand DNA co: Professional dashboard with Brand DNA components
Premium marketing collateral with brand: Premium marketing collateral with brand consistency
